appraisal_events.evidence: « j’éclatai de fureur et de désespoir … Je maudissais Robert de Saint-Loup » après avoir appris qu’Albertine l’avait vu, « que cela avait fait tout manquer »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator holds Robert responsible for having compromised the approach by letting himself be seen by Albertine, which would have prevented her from returning and gives the narrator an air of dependence.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, Robert is depreciated by the narrator, who accuses him of having made the plan fail and of having worsened his position vis-à-vis Albertine.
